case_title: CRISTOPHER WAZNA-BLANK VS. RAQUEL ARELLANO et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-27-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-17-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. DEC-16-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-17-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARELLANO, RAQUEL ARELLANO, JOSE LUIS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-08-2012.

DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SCOTT DAVID KALKIN.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAR-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
